title: STRIKE-POINT: Full Pipeline — iPhone to NCL Brain Cortex
objective: Build, test, and deploy the complete STRIKE-POINT pipeline so that a pump prompt sent from NATRIX's iPhone via FirstStrike app arrives in NCL/mandate-generation/input/ as a structured JSON file, triggering mandate generation. Three-phase rollout: working → reliable → fast.

approval_gate.note: lets build this out make a goal mandate roadmap and tasklist and execute

goal.statement: Make STRIKE-POINT the operational nervous system of NARTIX — a zero-friction pipeline where NATRIX picks up the iPhone, fires a pump prompt, and it lands in NCL ready for council processing within 5 seconds.
goal.success_vision: NATRIX sends a pump prompt from iPhone while walking → it appears in NCL/mandate-generation/input/ instantly → council processes it → mandate generated → NCC executes → feedback loops back. All automated. No terminal. No manual file moves.
key_metrics: End-to-end latency: pump sent → file written < 5 seconds
Zero manual steps between iPhone send and NCL file drop
Health check passes from iPhone before every send

phase_1.name: Make It Work
phase_1.description: Basic end-to-end pipeline. Pump prompt goes from FirstStrike app to relay to NCL file system.
milestones: M1.1: Relay writes pump prompts to NCL/mandate-generation/input/ (atomic file write)
M1.2: /health endpoint added to relay (returns connectivity + disk status)
M1.3: Tailscale installed on iPhone (NATRIX action)
M1.4: End-to-end test passes: iPhone → Tailscale → Relay → NCL file drop
M1.5: STRIKE-POINT CLAUDE.md created with pipeline context

phase_2.name: Make It Reliable
phase_2.description: Add monitoring, error handling, retry logic, and persistent service management.
milestones: M2.1: Relay runs as launchd service (auto-start, auto-restart on crash)
M2.2: Structured logging with rotation (relay.log, 7-day retention)
M2.3: Retry logic in FirstStrike app (3 retries, exponential backoff)
M2.4: Relay validates pump prompt schema before writing
M2.5: Alert system: relay down > 5 min → notification to NATRIX

phase_3.name: Make It Fast + Polish
phase_3.description: Optimize latency, add queue management, polish iOS UX.
milestones: M3.1: Pump prompt queue with priority ordering
M3.2: FirstStrike app shows delivery confirmation with NCL receipt ID
M3.3: iOS Shortcut integration (Siri: 'Hey Siri, pump prompt')
M3.4: Relay dashboard: web UI showing recent pumps, status, latency
M3.5: Full documentation + architecture diagram in STRIKE-POINT repo

phase_1_tasks.task: Add NCL file writer to relay-pump-endpoint.py
Install Tailscale on iPhone + join tailnet
Run end-to-end test: iPhone → Relay → NCL

phase_2_tasks.task: Add structured JSON logging with rotation
Add retry logic to FirstStrike RelayClient.swift
Add pump prompt schema validation to relay

phase_3_tasks.task: Add priority queue to relay pump processing
Add delivery confirmation to FirstStrike UI
Build Siri Shortcut integration for pump prompts
Build relay web dashboard (status + recent pumps)

notes: This mandate is infrastructure-critical. STRIKE-POINT is the sole entry point to NCL. Without it, no pump prompts reach the brain, no mandates get generated, and the entire downstream pipeline (NCC, BRS, AAC) stalls. Treat as foundational.
